version_description: This one is Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb tuning with Am, Em, and C as main chords. These chords make it easier for beginner guitarists to play. The key has been switched over from C#m to G. If you try to play over the studio recording of the song it most likely will not work due to the change in key.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
Black leather glove, no sequins[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Buckles on the jacket, it's Alyx shit[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Nike crossbody, got a piece in it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Got a dance, but it's really on some street shit[/tab]

I'ma show you how to get it

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
It go right foot up, left foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin' either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't you wanna dance with me? No?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I could dance like Michael Jackson[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I could give you thug passion[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
It's a Thriller in the trap where we from[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Baby, don't you wanna dance with me? No?[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
I could dance like Michael Jackson[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I could give you satisfaction[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And you know we out here every day with it[/tab]

I'ma show you how to get it

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
It go right foot up, left foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin' either way, we 'bout to slide, ayyy, I'm sayin' either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy (Who's bad?)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Two thousand shorties wanna tie the knot, ayy, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Two hundred shooters on my brother's block, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Petal off a rose like I love her not, maybe not[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I don't know what's wrong with me, I can't stop, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Won't stop, woah, yeah, never stop[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Got so many opps, I be mistakin' opps for other opps[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Got so many people that I love out of troubled spots[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Other than the family I got, it's either you or me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
That's just how I think, it's either you or me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
This life got too deep for you, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Two or three of us about to creep where they stayin'[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Toosie slide, then I hit it double-time[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Then I hit a spin 'cause we spun their block a couple times[/tab]

If it's not the right time, there'll always be another time
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm not even trippin', we'll just see 'em in the summertime, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Can't describe the pressure I be puttin' on myself, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Really, I just can't afford to lose nobody else, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
If they movin' shaky, we'll just do this shit ourselves, woah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
If I'm movin' shaky, Chubbs'll do this shit himself, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Solo niggas, only YOLO, for real[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Heard a lot about you but we don't know for real[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
